title: IndividualAccount

email.description: The eBay user's registration email address.

primaryPhone.description: The container that returns the eBay user's primary phone number information.

registrationAddress.description: The container that returns the eBay user's address information.

secondaryPhone.description: The container that returns the eBay user's secondary phone number information.

description: The type that defines the fields for the information of an individual account.
